message:
feat: Add getattr pattern support to skipUnless condition evaluator

Add compile-time evaluation for patterns like:
@unittest.skipUnless(getattr(sys, 'float_repr_style', '') == 'short', ...)

This correctly skips tests that depend on sys attributes not defined
in metal0 (like float_repr_style, int_max_str_digits, hash_info).

For sys.platform, returns the current platform.
For unknown sys attrs, returns the getattr default value.

Fixes test_previous_round_bugs and test_matches_float_format
being incorrectly run instead of skipped.
